description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a predominantly dark red cover, featuring a large yellow square on the front. The front cover displays a photographic image of a person with short, light-colored hair in profile, occupying the left half of the yellow square. The right half of the yellow square contains bold, uppercase text. Below the yellow square, there is additional large text in yellow, and a smaller dark rectangle, possibly a label or barcode. The book appears to be a hardcover edition, with a solid, boxy shape and sharp edges. The back cover is similar in design but lacks the photographic image, and the spine is plain with minimal visible detail.
description: A dark red hardcover book with a yellow square on the front, featuring a profile photo and bold text. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the yellow square with a profile photo and bold text, plus a dark rectangle near the bottom.
description_view_1: Spine view reveals a plain dark red surface with the yellow square wrapping around, minimal text visible.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front but lacks the profile photo, showing only the yellow square and text.
description_view_3: Opposite spine view, similar to view 1, with the yellow square and minimal visible detail.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration is a photographic image of a person with short, light-colored hair shown in profile, set against a yellow background. The style is realistic and modern, focusing on the subject's facial features and head. No additional decorative elements or artwork are visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark red with a yellow square wrapping around from the front and back covers. Minimal text is visible, and there are no decorative elements.
